def: A flask in which gunpowder is carried, having a charging tubeat the end.
Having more than one axis; developing in more than a singleline or plain; -- opposed to Ant: monoaxial.
A circular opening to recive a hook, cord, ring, or rope; aneyelet.
A small house; a cot; a hut.
Exerting controlling power; as, an overruling Providence.-- O`ver*rul"ing*ly, adv.
In a solemn manner; with gravity; seriously; formally.There in deaf murmurs solemnly are wise. Dryden.I do solemnly assure the reader. Swift.
To preconceive; to imagine beforehand. [Obs.] Bacon.
A Mexican drug, used as an aphrodisiac.

To be reluctant or to hesitate, as regards an action, onaccount of considerations of conscience or expedience.We are often over-precise, scrupling to say or do those things whichlawfully we may. Fuller.Men scruple at the lawfulness of a set form of divine worship. South.
